rows.value:
Test reaction of setting input text_box and button that depends on value. 

The button should become active when a user types and disabled when the input is cleared.
There is a slight delay (default 500ms), but even if a user tries to tap button before that time passes the system will auto-correct to either update value or disable as required

More details in https://github.com/IDEMSInternational/open-app-builder/pull/3391
